name: PacWest Bancorp Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/40th Interest in a Share of 7.75% Fixed Rate Non-Cumulative Perpetual Preferred Stock Series A
summary: PacWest Bancorp offers banking products and services in California. They operate commercial bank branches and offer commercial real estate and business loans, as well as deposit accounts and treasury management services. PacWest Bancorp is headquartered in Los Angeles, California.
